author: Vincent Voyer
subject: docs(examples): urlSync example implem now update URL every 700ms (algolia/react-instantsearch#1916)
body:
Before this commit, we were advocating for updating the url at every keystrokes.
We had multiple reports since releases of instansearch.js that this led to slowdowns
of the browser UI.

fixes algolia/react-instantsearch#1856
